subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who was and ever shall be even as He hath been, and blessings and peace be upon the Lord of all existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان و یکون بمثل ما قد کان و الصلوه و السلام علی سید الامکان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
